acceptance_criteria.text: Regeneration jobs and attempts persist in PostgreSQL through Alembic-managed schema.
proof: Production to_regclass check returns serviceregenerationjobs and serviceregenerationjobitems.

acceptance_criteria.text: Backend supports manual confirmation before starting a batch.
proof: POST /api/services/regenerate-problematic creates awaiting_confirmation unless confirm is true.
Confirm with job_id starts the persisted job and background thread.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI separates manual review from ordinary needs_review.
proof: Service quality now has status manual_review and manualReview flag.
Manual-review services are not counted as needsReview and single optimize button is disabled for them.
Service list attaches latest regeneration item as regeneration_history.
CardServicesTable renders latest status, attempt, after-issues, and error.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram asks for confirmation before starting batch.
proof: Telegram first click creates awaiting_confirmation and shows confirmation button.
svc_regen_go:<job_id> callback confirms and starts the same backend job.
429 sets job status rate_limited and stores cooldown_until.
New start requests return rate_limit_cooldown while cooldown is active.
UI displays cooldown time when job returns rate_limited.
Production app/worker running, health 200, route auth checks 401, Telegram service active.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/core/service_problem_regeneration.py src/core/service_keyword_scoring.py src/api/services_api.py src/telegram_bot.py alembic_migrations/versions/20260505_add_service_regeneration_jobs.py
cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app flask db current
known_gaps: Background execution is still app-thread triggered, not a separate worker queue consumer. Jobs and attempts are durable now, so a worker consumer can be added later.
The per-service history UI shows latest item inline; a fuller history drawer remains a future polish.
